title: Natsume's Book of Friends
sourceNotes: Source is the ongoing Natsume Yuujinchou manga by Yuki Midorikawa (AniList 31859; ~33 volumes / ~135 chapters as of 2026, still RELEASING — AniList lists no chapter count). The anime is a highly episodic, largely one-story-per-episode adaptation that pulls chapters OUT OF ORDER and interleaves LaLa specials (numbered as .5 chapters), so chapter boundaries are approximate spans, NOT contiguous 1:1 ranges — later seasons revisit earlier chapters and overlap. Because the show has no named story arcs, mappings are given per TV season using each season's title as the arc label. Cumulative episodes across S1 (13) + S2/Zoku (13) + S3/San (13) + S4/Shi (13) + S5/Go (11) + S6/Roku (11) + S7/Shichi (12) = 86 episodes. Per-season chapter spans derived from fan chapter↔episode masterlists (aislinceivun, treecakes); S7 (2024) adapted roughly manga volumes 20-27. Final chapters-only entry covers the unadapted ongoing tail.

movies.title: Natsume's Book of Friends: The Waking of the Ephemeral
movies.note: Canon theatrical feature (Utsusemi ni Musubu) with an original in-continuity story following Natsume and Nyanko-sensei; new animation, released after the TV run.

movies.title: Natsume Yuujinchou: Ishi Okoshi to Ayashiki Raihousha
movies.note: Canon theatrical release of new-animation Natsume stories (The Waking of Stone and the Suspicious Visitor) in the same continuity.
